verses.verse_text: That expression is incomplete. God is infinite in perfection, but the infinite by itself is an abstract idea, not a full description of God. It points to God's greatness, but does not express all that God is as the Supreme Intelligence and First Cause of all things.

sections.section_title: Proofs of the Existence of God
sections.section_summary: There is no effect without a cause. Human beings also carry an inner sense that God exists.

verses.verse_text: There is no effect without a cause. Since the universe exists, it must have a cause. To deny God, one would have to deny this basic principle and say that something can come from nothing.
verses.image_prompt: Create a minimalist educational infographic diagram with a dark charcoal or deep navy background, balanced spacing, simple geometric forms, soft gradients, subtle glow, clear hierarchy, and no visual clutter. Since the universe exists, it must have a cause. To deny God, one would have to deny this basic principle and say that something can come from nothing.. Do not force visible spirits if the verse does not require them. Keep it suitable for educational use and later video adaptation; avoid text labels unless relational labeling is essential.

verses.verse_text: Human beings also carry an inner sense that God exists. This feeling is too widespread to be explained only by teaching. Even where formal instruction is lacking, the idea of a Supreme Being appears again and again.

verses.verse_text: Some claim that matter itself is the first cause. But matter and its properties also need a cause. So matter cannot be the ultimate source of everything.

verses.verse_text: Others explain the universe by chance. But chance is blind. It cannot account for the order, balance, and harmony seen in creation. The laws of nature point to intelligence.

Keep it suitable for educational use and later video adaptation; avoid text labels unless relational labeling is essential.

verses.verse_text: We know the first cause by its works. A work shows something about the one who made it. The greatness of the universe, and the wisdom seen in its order, point to an intelligence far above humanity.

verses.verse_text: Even without grasping God’s essence, reason can recognize certain necessary divine perfections. When God is called eternal, immutable, immaterial, one, all-powerful, and supremely just and good, this gives a true human idea, though not full knowledge. If any of these qualities were lacking, God would not be supreme.

verses.verse_text: If God were only the sum of created things, then God would be an effect rather than the first cause. God cannot be both cause and effect. The idea of God requires a being who exists by himself, not one produced by the universe.

Verse concept: If God were only the sum of created things, then God would be an effect rather than the first cause. God cannot be both cause and effect. The idea of God requires a being who exists by himself, not one produced by the universe.. Do not force visible spirits if the verse does not require them. Keep it suitable for educational use and later video adaptation; avoid text labels unless relational labeling is essential.

verses.verse_text: Pantheism teaches that everything is God, and God is everything. This can seem attractive because the universe is immense, ordered, and intelligent. But it confuses the Creator with creation.
verses.image_prompt: Create a minimalist educational infographic diagram with a dark charcoal or deep navy background, balanced spacing, simple geometric forms, soft gradients, subtle glow, clear hierarchy, and no visual clutter. Verse concept: Pantheism teaches that everything is God, and God is everything. This can seem attractive because the universe is immense, ordered, and intelligent. But it confuses the Creator with creation.. Do not force visible spirits if the verse does not require them. Keep it suitable for educational use and later video adaptation; avoid text labels unless relational labeling is essential.

verses.verse_text: If God were identical with matter or with changing beings, then God would also change. But matter and created things are variable, dependent, and limited. So these properties cannot be assigned to God.

sections.section_summary: The difference between God and the universe is not just one of size or power. A machine is not the engineer who designed it.

verses.verse_text: The difference between God and the universe is not just one of size or power. God belongs to a different order.

verses.verse_text: A machine is not the engineer who designed it. A painting is not the artist. In the same way, creation shows divine intelligence, wisdom, and power, but it is not God.

verses.verse_text: Pantheism fails because it removes this distinction. By making the universe identical with God, it weakens the divine attributes and denies the full independence of the Creator.
